auth_notes: Airbnb does not provide a public API for general developers. Access is restricted to 'Airbnb Partners' (PMS/Channel Managers). Unofficial integration requires extracting session cookies or using a third-party API proxy.
rate_limits: Strict and undocumented for unofficial access; partner limits vary by tier.
gotchas: No public API access for individual developers or small-scale automation.
High risk of account flagging or IP blocking when using unofficial endpoints.
Session-based authentication is fragile and requires frequent manual updates.
research_notes: Direct integration via HTTP Request node is only feasible for official partners. Most n8n users should use the iCal integration for calendar sync or a third-party wrapper like Apify or a dedicated PMS API that offers a public developer portal.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Direct integration via HTTP Request node is only feasible for official partners. Most n8n users should use the iCal integration for calendar sync or a third-party wrapper like Apify or a dedicated PMS API that offers a public developer portal.
